settings.heading: Services
settings.text: Personal styling, wardrobe edits, and occasion dressing — considered help for a wardrobe you actually wear.

settings.title: Personal Styling Consultation
settings.desc: A one-on-one session to understand your fit preferences, lifestyle, colour comfort, and everyday outfit goals.

settings.title: Wardrobe Edit & Outfit Planning
settings.desc: A practical edit of what to keep, what to pair, and which missing pieces will make getting dressed easier.

settings.title: Occasion Dressing Session
settings.desc: Looks for weddings, festive days, work events, and travel, styled with comfort, proportion, and repeat wear in mind.

settings.title: Fit & Size Guidance
settings.desc: Measurements, silhouette notes, and fabric guidance to help you choose the right size before you order.

settings.title: Bridal & Event Styling
settings.desc: A focused styling programme for ceremonies, parties, and milestone moments, planned look by look.

settings.title: Virtual Style Coaching
settings.desc: Expert guidance from anywhere, with seasonal check-ins to keep your wardrobe feeling current and useful.

settings.heading: What We Do
settings.text: Services designed around your wardrobe — from first consultation to outfits you keep reaching for.

settings.name: Discover
settings.desc: We begin with a conversation about your lifestyle, fit preferences, colour comfort, and wardrobe gaps.

settings.name: Fit
settings.desc: We map sizing, proportions, fabric preferences, and the occasions your clothes need to handle.

settings.name: Curate
settings.desc: We build outfit ideas and product recommendations that work together instead of sitting alone.

settings.name: Wear
settings.desc: We refine your wardrobe season by season as your plans, climate, and personal style evolve.
